_meta.description: Cross-reference: RICEFW Object ID → SAP technical objects. Bridge between Smartsheet tracker and abapGit source.

columns.ricefw_id: RICEFW Object ID from Smartsheet Object Tracker (e.g., PTPW0367_IP, SCPIPSPRF0026)
columns.tower: Tower shortcode (FPR, OTC-IF, OTC-IP, FTS-IF, FTS-IP, PTP, MDM, E2E)
columns.l2_capability: L2 Capability ID from capability_master.yaml (e.g., DC-010-070)
columns.sap_objects: Array of SAP technical object names contained in this RICEFW object

_meta.usage: Populated by tower leads. Used by pipeline to join Smartsheet RICEFW → abapGit source → JIRA (via L2→L3 mapping).

mappings._comment: EXAMPLE — replace with actual mappings from tower leads
